text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We stop off at a mall on our way home after a
day out, where we find people getting excited
about an event.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I need a volunteer. Just choose whichever card
you'd like. How about that darling pony over
there? Care to lend a hand?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Who, me?! Oooh!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh, guess there's a magic show.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Not particularly. But...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
A lot of card tricks like that rely on mathematical
logic.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
choice_data_list:
Well, since we're here, why don't we watch for a
bit?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While she doesn't reply, she does stop walking,
and we end up observing Fuji Kiseki's magic show
from a distance.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy you came to watch my little
performance! Did you enjoy yourselves?
choice_data_list: It was a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad to hear it! ♪ It was extra exciting when I
saw familiar faces in the audience!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And judging by the look on your face, Shakur, it
looks like I did all right.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't bad. Your packet switches were natural,
and you diverted the audience's attention like a
pro.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing. I was just thinking that you sound
pretty knowledgeable.
Say...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I don't suppose you'd want to put on a show
together?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why would I want to do that?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I've been puzzling over ways to spice up
my performance recently.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I think having an intelligent, logical person beside
me would be just the ticket!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No. There's nothing in that for me.
choice_data_list: Yeah, you should probably find someone else...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur considers anything besides racing to
be nothing more than noise. I start considering
who might be more appropriate for the role,
when...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
In that case, would you at least help me think up
some fresh tricks?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Why? It's not like I know all that much about
magic or anything.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Just having a new perspective would be helpful. It
could breathe some new life into the show, you
know? What do you say?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on. Don't just lower your demands to
try and talk me into it. It's sad.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But fine. If you're gonna beg, I'll help you think of
something now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Wait, now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As promised, Air Shakur comes up with an
impromptu magic trick on the spot.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So if you do this, you can move the card to any
position within the three rows of cards.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Three rows means it's base 3, and four rows
means it's base 4. You can just use a simple
method to turn the positional data into values.
...Well, there's no need to understand the
mathematical component.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As long as you follow the steps, there's no chance
it can fail. Math is like a flawless magic—one that
doesn't rely on any fancy sleights of hand.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The correct input will yield the desired results. It's
the same as the code for any well-written
program.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Amazing! Who would've thought such a simple
process could produce such spectacular results?
My heart is dancing just thinking of ways I can put
this to use in my performance!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Did you really just come up with this off the top
of your head?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing special. Anyone who understands the
logic behind it could do the same.
choice_data_list: You mean even I could do it?
You mean even I could do it?
Thinking it up on the spot is still amazing!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing special. Anyone who understands the
logic behind it could do the same.
choice_data_list: You mean even I could do it?
You mean even I could do it?
Thinking it up on the spot is still amazing!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I see! Indeed, if I were able to create tricks like
this myself, I could take the show in any direction
I like! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Shakur, would you do us the honor of becoming
our magic teacher?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Me, a teacher? You're kiddin', right?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I agree. And even though the logic behind it is so
complex, the trick itself is simple and easy to
understand.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You've definitely got a flair for showmanship. If
you ever feel like joining the act, just speak up!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah, like I'd be caught dead doing that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm outta here. And just so we're clear, that was
all the help I'm giving you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Just leave me alone, will ya?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur makes a rather cold departure, leaving
me to consider what I can do to assist this
complicated, yet incredibly talented
Umamusume.
